SCHEDULE
Food Reserve [No.6of 2020 97
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 6 of 2020
DateofAssent:23rdOctober,2020
An Act to continue the existence of the Food Reserve
Agency and re-define its functions; re-constitute the
Board of the Agency; to continue the existence of the
National Strategic Food Reserve; to repeal and replace
the Food Reserve Act, 1995; and to provide for matters
connected with, or incidental to, the foregoing.
[26thOtcober,2020
ENACTEDbytheParliament of Zambia. Enactment
PART I
PRELIMINARYPROVISIONS
